safeCourtLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that bank statement summaries are served but full transaction export, source banking records, and tracing material remain outstanding.
safePositionToday: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that bank statement summaries are served but full transaction export, source banking records, and tracing material remain outstanding.
askCourtToRecord: Outstanding disclosure: Full transaction export; Source banking records; Beneficiary tracing report.
Invite the court to order disclosure by a fixed date with a review hearing.
disclosureTimetable: The defence invites the court to order disclosure of Full transaction export; Source banking records; Beneficiary tracing report by [date] with a review on [date]. Position remains provisional.
doNotOverstate: Do not treat bank summaries alone as proof of fraud or account attribution.
